title: Tehran threatens to halt all Mideast energy exports after US reimposes its blockade on Iran
summary: The U.S. reimposed a naval blockade on Iran and intensified its airstrike campaign early Wednesday in retaliation for Tehran’s attacks on ships trying to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: The small engine part making oil changes more expensive
summary: Drivers of many newer vehicles are being hit with a surcharge at oil change time, because the little plug at the bottom of their car's engine can no longer be reused. Why is this happening?

title: Life after war: A veteran’s journey to find relief in ketamine therapy as program faces cuts
summary: A Florida-funded study is examining whether ketamine can help veterans struggling with mental health challenges, but advocates say the program's future is uncertain.

title: News to Know for July 15
summary: Pinellas schools ban smart glasses, tighten e-bike rules for students. Rays slugger Junior Caminero feels fortunate left hand not broken after he was hit in All-Star Game.

title: Death investigation underway at North Port apartment complex: NPPD
summary: The North Port Police Department (NPPD) said it is conducting a death investigation at an appartment complex on Wednesday morning.

summary: Pasco County's rapid growth is driving major investments in emergency services. As the county's population has increased by 22% since 2020, Pasco Fire Rescue is expanding its footprint with new stations and modern facilities designed to improve response times and firefighter safety.

title: Hernando County family, community honor the life of 8-year-old girl killed in accident
summary: Paisley Fratianni-Rollins was about to start third grade next month at J.D. Floyd Elementary School. Her family is now planning her funeral after a tragic accident.

title: New York puts yearlong moratorium on new data centers, citing energy and climate risks

title: Tampa property rezoning: Land tract near historic cemeteries sparks unmarked grave concerns
summary: A fierce debate is brewing over a 1.5-acre land tract on North Boulevard that sits among historic cemeteries and could contain unmarked graves. The Hillsborough County Planning Commission began reviewing a residential rezoning request this week that preservation advocates strongly oppose.

title: Trump administration highlights NATO allies' progress in defense spending pledge
summary: NATO allies are spending more on defense after the Ankara summit. Here's what it means for Ukraine and the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Lakeland Electric explains what's behind higher summer power bills
summary: Some customers say their monthly bills have jumped by more than $100 this summer, prompting a wave of complaints on social media.
